pitch.english: Use to trim if the heli drifts in one of the stabilized modes (angle, horizon, etc.).
pitch.translation: Use to trim if the heli drifts in one of the stabilized modes (Kat, horizon, etc.).

roll.english: Use to trim if the heli drifts in one of the stabilized modes (angle, horizon, etc.).
roll.translation: Use to trim if the heli drifts in one of the stabilized modes (Kat, horizon, etc.).

batteryCapacity.english: The milliamp hour capacity of your battery.

batteryCellCount.english: The number of cells in your battery.

vbatfullcellvoltage.english: The nominal voltage of a fully charged cell.
vbatfullcellvoltage.translation: Napięcie nominalne w pełni naładowanego ogniwa.

vbatmaxcellvoltage.english: The maximum voltage per cell before the high voltage alarm is triggered.
vbatmaxcellvoltage.translation: The Max voltage per cell before the high voltage alarm is triggered.

vbatmincellvoltage.english: The minimum voltage per cell before the low voltage alarm is triggered.
vbatmincellvoltage.translation: The Min voltage per cell before the low voltage alarm is triggered.

vbatwarningcellvoltage.english: The voltage per cell at which the low voltage alarm will start to sound.
vbatwarningcellvoltage.translation: Napięcie na ogniwo, przy którym zacznie włączać się alarm niskiego napięcia.

fuel_drop_rate.english: Maximum rate the reported SmartFuel value may decrease in voltage mode while flying.
fuel_drop_rate.translation: Maksymalna szybkość raportowana wartość SmartFuel może spaść w trybie napięcia podczas lotu.

fuel_rise_rate.english: Maximum rate the reported SmartFuel value may recover in voltage mode after load is reduced.
fuel_rise_rate.translation: Maksymalna szybkość raportowanej wartości SmartFuel może zostać przywrócona w trybie napięciowym po zmniejszeniu obciążenia.

sag_multiplier.english: Raise or lower to adjust for the amount of voltage sag you see in flight.
sag_multiplier.translation: Podnieś lub opuść, aby dostosować się do wielkości spadku napięcia widocznego w locie.

sag_multiplier_percent.english: Sag compensation factor used in voltage mode. 0.70x is the default, 1.00x is neutral, and larger values increase compensation.
sag_multiplier_percent.translation: Współczynnik kompensacji ugięcia używany w trybie napięciowym. Wartość domyślna 0,70x jest wartością domyślną, wartość neutralna 1,00x, a większe wartości zwiększają kompensację.

smartfuel_source.english: Choose whether local SmartFuel uses current consumption, pack voltage, or combined mode. Combined uses the more pessimistic of voltage and current consumption.
smartfuel_source.translation: Wybierz, czy lokalny SmartFuel wykorzystuje pobór prądu, napięcie pakietu, czy tryb łączony. Połączone wykorzystuje bardziej pesymistyczne podejście do zużycia napięcia i prądu.

stabilize_delay.english: How long SmartFuel waits after power-up or reset before beginning startup stabilization in both current and voltage modes.
stabilize_delay.translation: Jak długo SmartFuel czeka po włączeniu zasilania lub resecie przed rozpoczęciem stabilizacji rozruchu zarówno w trybie prądowym, jak i napięciowym.

stable_window.english: Maximum allowed pack-voltage variation during startup stabilization before SmartFuel is treated as settled in both current and voltage modes.
stable_window.translation: Maksymalna dozwolona zmienność napięcia pakietu podczas stabilizacji rozruchu, zanim SmartFuel zostanie potraktowana jako ustalona zarówno w trybie prądowym, jak i napięciowym.

voltage_fall_limit.english: Limits how quickly filtered voltage may fall in voltage mode to reduce brief load-sag spikes affecting SmartFuel.
voltage_fall_limit.translation: Ogranicza szybkość spadku przefiltrowanego napięcia w trybie napięciowym, aby zredukować krótkie skoki zapadu obciążenia wpływające na SmartFuel.

cell_count.english: Number of cells in the battery

current_gain.english: Gain value for the current sensor
current_gain.translation: Gain value for the current Czujnik

low_voltage_protection.english: Voltage at which we cut power by 50%
low_voltage_protection.translation: Napięcie przy którym odcinamy moc o 50%

temperature_protection.english: Temperature at which we cut power by 50%
temperature_protection.translation: Temperatura at which we cut power by 50%

half_duplex.english: Half duplex mode for ESC telemetry

pin_swap.english: Swap the TX and RX pins for the ESC telemetry
pin_swap.translation: Zamień piny TX i RX na telemetrię ESC

dyn_notch_max_hz.english: Maximum frequency to which the notch is applied.
dyn_notch_max_hz.translation: Max frequency to which the notch is applied.

dyn_notch_min_hz.english: Minimum frequency to which the notch is applied.
dyn_notch_min_hz.translation: Min frequency to which the notch is applied.

dyn_notch_q.english: Quality factor of the notch filter.

gyro_lpf1_dyn_max_hz.english: Dynamic filter max cutoff in Hz.
gyro_lpf1_dyn_max_hz.translation: Maksymalne odcięcie filtra dynamicznego w Hz.

gyro_lpf1_dyn_min_hz.english: Dynamic filter min cutoff in Hz.
gyro_lpf1_dyn_min_hz.translation: Min. odcięcie filtra dynamicznego w Hz.

gyro_lpf1_static_hz.english: Lowpass filter cutoff frequency in Hz.
gyro_lpf1_static_hz.translation: Częstotliwość odcięcia filtra dolnoprzepustowego w Hz.

gyro_lpf2_static_hz.english: Lowpass filter cutoff frequency in Hz.
gyro_lpf2_static_hz.translation: Częstotliwość odcięcia filtra dolnoprzepustowego w Hz.

gyro_soft_notch_cutoff_1.english: Width of the notch filter in Hz.

gyro_soft_notch_cutoff_2.english: Width of the notch filter in Hz.

gyro_soft_notch_hz_1.english: Center frequency to which the notch is applied.
gyro_soft_notch_hz_1.translation: Srodek frequency to which the notch is applied.

gyro_soft_notch_hz_2.english: Center frequency to which the notch is applied.
gyro_soft_notch_hz_2.translation: Srodek frequency to which the notch is applied.

rpm_min_hz.english: Minimum frequency for the RPM filter.
rpm_min_hz.translation: Min frequency for the RPM filter.

gov_handover_throttle.english: Governor activates above this %. Below this the input throttle is passed to the ESC.
gov_handover_throttle.translation: Governor activates above this %. Ponizej this the input throttle is passed to the ESC.

gov_recovery_time.english: Time constant for recovery spoolup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_recovery_time.translation: Czas constant for recovery spoolup, in seconds, measuring the Czas from zero to Pelny Obroty.

gov_spoolup_min_throttle.english: Minimum throttle to use for slow spoolup, in percent. For electric motors the default is 5%, for nitro this should be set so the clutch starts to engage for a smooth spoolup 10-15%.
gov_spoolup_min_throttle.translation: Min throttle to use for slow spoolup, in Procent. For electric motors the default is 5%, for nitro this should be set so the clutch starts to engage for a smooth spoolup 10-15%.

gov_spoolup_time.english: Time constant for slow spoolup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_spoolup_time.translation: Czas constant for slow spoolup, in seconds, measuring the Czas from zero to Pelny Obroty.

gov_startup_time.english: Time constant for slow startup, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_startup_time.translation: Czas constant for slow startup, in seconds, measuring the Czas from zero to Pelny Obroty.

gov_tracking_time.english: Time constant for headspeed changes, in seconds, measuring the time from zero to full headspeed.
gov_tracking_time.translation: Czas constant for Obroty changes, in seconds, measuring the Czas from zero to Pelny Obroty.

governor_collective_ff_weight.english: Collective precompensation weight - how much collective is mixed into the feedforward.
governor_collective_ff_weight.translation: Kolektyw precompensation weight - how much Kolektyw is mixed into the feedforward.

governor_cyclic_ff_weight.english: Cyclic precompensation weight - how much cyclic is mixed into the feedforward.
governor_cyclic_ff_weight.translation: Cyklicz precompensation weight - how much Cyklicz is mixed into the feedforward.

governor_headspeed.english: Target headspeed for the current profile.
governor_headspeed.translation: Target Obroty for the current Profil.

governor_max_throttle.english: Maximum output throttle the governor is allowed to use.
governor_max_throttle.translation: Max output throttle the Governor is allowed to use.

governor_min_throttle.english: Minimum output throttle the governor is allowed to use.
governor_min_throttle.translation: Min output throttle the Governor is allowed to use.

governor_tta_gain.english: TTA gain applied to increase headspeed to control the tail in the negative direction (e.g. motorised tail less than idle speed).
governor_tta_gain.translation: TTA gain applied to increase Obroty to control the Ogon in the negative direction (e.g. motorised Ogon less than idle Predkosc).

governor_tta_limit.english: TTA max headspeed increase over full headspeed.
governor_tta_limit.translation: TTA Max Obroty increase over Pelny Obroty.

governor_yaw_ff_weight.english: Yaw precompensation weight - how much yaw is mixed into the feedforward.
governor_yaw_ff_weight.translation: Waga wstępnej kompensacji odchylenia - ile odchylenia jest dodawane do sprzężenia do przodu.

collective_tilt_correction_neg.english: Adjust the collective tilt correction scaling for negative collective pitch.
collective_tilt_correction_neg.translation: Adjust the Kolektyw tilt Korekta scaling for negative Kolektyw pitch.

collective_tilt_correction_pos.english: Adjust the collective tilt correction scaling for positive collective pitch.
collective_tilt_correction_pos.translation: Adjust the Kolektyw tilt Korekta scaling for positive Kolektyw pitch.

swash_geo_correction.english: Adjust if there is too much negative collective or too much positive collective.
swash_geo_correction.translation: Adjust if there is too much negative Kolektyw or too much positive Kolektyw.

swash_phase.english: Phase offset for the swashplate controls.
swash_phase.translation: Przesunięcie fazowe dla elementów sterujących tarczy sterującej.

swash_pitch_limit.english: Maximum amount of combined cyclic and collective blade pitch.
swash_pitch_limit.translation: Max amount of combined Cyklicz and Kolektyw blade pitch.

swash_trim_0.english: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.
swash_trim_0.translation: Listwa sterująca służąca do wypoziomowania tarczy sterującej w przypadku stosowania łączników stałych.

swash_trim_1.english: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.
swash_trim_1.translation: Listwa sterująca służąca do wypoziomowania tarczy sterującej w przypadku stosowania łączników stałych.

swash_trim_2.english: Swash trim to level the swash plate when using fixed links.
swash_trim_2.translation: Listwa sterująca służąca do wypoziomowania tarczy sterującej w przypadku stosowania łączników stałych.

tail_center_trim.english: Sets tail rotor trim for 0 yaw for variable pitch, or tail motor throttle for 0 yaw for motorized.
tail_center_trim.translation: Sets Ogon rotor trim for 0 yaw for variable pitch, or Ogon Silnik throttle for 0 yaw for motorized.

tail_motor_idle.english: Minimum throttle signal sent to the tail motor. This should be set just high enough that the motor does not stop.
tail_motor_idle.translation: Min throttle signal sent to the Ogon Silnik. This should be set just high enough that the Silnik does not stop.

maxthrottle.english: This PWM value is sent to the ESC/Servo at full throttle
maxthrottle.translation: This PWM value is sent to the ESC/Servo at Pelny throttle

mincommand.english: This PWM value is sent when the motor is stopped
mincommand.translation: This PWM value is sent when the Silnik is stopped

minthrottle.english: This PWM value is sent to the ESC/Servo at low throttle
minthrottle.translation: Ta wartość PWM jest wysyłana do ESC/Servo przy małej przepustnicy

motor_pole_count_0.english: The number of magnets on the motor bell.
motor_pole_count_0.translation: The number of magnets on the Silnik bell.

motor_pwm_protocol.english: The protocol used to communicate with the ESC
motor_pwm_protocol.translation: The protocol Uzyte to communicate with the ESC

motor_pwm_rate.english: The frequency at which the ESC sends PWM signals to the motor
motor_pwm_rate.translation: The frequency at which the ESC sends PWM signals to the Silnik

angle_level_limit.english: Limit the maximum angle the helicopter will pitch/roll to while in Angle mode.
angle_level_limit.translation: Limit the Max Kat the helicopter will pitch/roll to while in Kat mode.

angle_level_strength.english: Determines how aggressively the helicopter tilts back to level while in Angle Mode.
angle_level_strength.translation: Determines how aggressively the helicopter tilts Wstecz to level while in Kat Mode.

bterm_cutoff_0.translation: Wartość odcięcia terminu B w Hz.

bterm_cutoff_1.translation: Wartość odcięcia terminu B w Hz.

bterm_cutoff_2.translation: Wartość odcięcia terminu B w Hz.

cyclic_cross_coupling_cutoff.english: Frequency limit for the compensation. Higher value will make the compensation action faster.
cyclic_cross_coupling_cutoff.translation: Limit częstotliwości dla kompensacji. Wyższa wartość przyspieszy działanie kompensacyjne.

cyclic_cross_coupling_gain.english: Amount of compensation applied for pitch-to-roll decoupling.
cyclic_cross_coupling_gain.translation: Kwota rekompensaty zastosowana za oddzielenie typu pitch-to-roll.

cyclic_cross_coupling_ratio.english: Amount of roll-to-pitch compensation needed, vs. pitch-to-roll.
cyclic_cross_coupling_ratio.translation: Kwota potrzebnej kompensacji między przechyleniem a przechyleniem.

error_decay_limit_cyclic.english: Maximum bleed-off speed for cyclic I-term.
error_decay_limit_cyclic.translation: Max bleed-Off Predkosc for Cyklicz I-term.

error_decay_time_cyclic.english: Time constant for bleeding off cyclic I-term. Higher will stabilize hover, lower will drift.
error_decay_time_cyclic.translation: Czas constant for bleeding Off Cyklicz I-term. Higher will stabilize hover, lower will drift.

error_decay_time_ground.english: Bleeds off the current controller error when the craft is not airborne to stop the craft tipping over.
error_decay_time_ground.translation: Bleeds Off the current controller Blad when the craft is not airborne to stop the craft tipping over.

error_limit_0.english: Hard limit for the angle error in the PID loop. The absolute error and thus the I-term will never go above these limits.
error_limit_0.translation: Hard limit for the Kat Blad in the PID loop. The absolute Blad and thus the I-term will never go above these Limity.

error_limit_1.english: Hard limit for the angle error in the PID loop. The absolute error and thus the I-term will never go above these limits.
error_limit_1.translation: Hard limit for the Kat Blad in the PID loop. The absolute Blad and thus the I-term will never go above these Limity.

error_limit_2.english: Hard limit for the angle error in the PID loop. The absolute error and thus the I-term will never go above these limits.
error_limit_2.translation: Hard limit for the Kat Blad in the PID loop. The absolute Blad and thus the I-term will never go above these Limity.

error_rotation.english: Rotates the current roll and pitch error terms around yaw when the craft rotates. This is sometimes called Piro Compensation.
error_rotation.translation: Rotates the current roll and pitch Blad terms around yaw when the craft rotates. This is sometimes called Piro Compensation.

gyro_cutoff_0.english: PID loop overall bandwidth in Hz.
gyro_cutoff_0.translation: PID całkowita szerokość pasma pętli w Hz.

gyro_cutoff_1.english: PID loop overall bandwidth in Hz.
gyro_cutoff_1.translation: PID całkowita szerokość pasma pętli w Hz.

gyro_cutoff_2.english: PID loop overall bandwidth in Hz.
gyro_cutoff_2.translation: PID całkowita szerokość pasma pętli w Hz.

horizon_level_strength.english: Determines how aggressively the helicopter tilts back to level while in Horizon Mode.
horizon_level_strength.translation: Determines how aggressively the helicopter tilts Wstecz to level while in Horizon Mode.

iterm_relax_cutoff_0.english: Helps reduce bounce back after fast stick movements. Can cause inconsistency in small stick movements if too low.
iterm_relax_cutoff_0.translation: Helps reduce bounce Wstecz after fast stick movements. Can cause inconsistency in small stick movements if too low.

iterm_relax_cutoff_1.english: Helps reduce bounce back after fast stick movements. Can cause inconsistency in small stick movements if too low.
iterm_relax_cutoff_1.translation: Helps reduce bounce Wstecz after fast stick movements. Can cause inconsistency in small stick movements if too low.

iterm_relax_cutoff_2.english: Helps reduce bounce back after fast stick movements. Can cause inconsistency in small stick movements if too low.
iterm_relax_cutoff_2.translation: Helps reduce bounce Wstecz after fast stick movements. Can cause inconsistency in small stick movements if too low.

iterm_relax_type.english: Choose the axes in which this is active. RP: Roll, Pitch. RPY: Roll, Pitch, Yaw.
iterm_relax_type.translation: Choose the axes in which this is Aktywny. RP: Roll, Pitch. RPY: Roll, Pitch, Yaw.

offset_limit_0.english: Hard limit for the High Speed Integral offset angle in the PID loop. The O-term will never go over these limits.
offset_limit_0.translation: Hard limit for the High Predkosc Integral offset Kat in the PID loop. The O-term will never go over these Limity.

offset_limit_1.english: Hard limit for the High Speed Integral offset angle in the PID loop. The O-term will never go over these limits.
offset_limit_1.translation: Hard limit for the High Predkosc Integral offset Kat in the PID loop. The O-term will never go over these Limity.

pitch_collective_ff_gain.english: Increasing will compensate for the pitching up motion caused by tail drag when climbing.
pitch_collective_ff_gain.translation: Increasing will compensate for the pitching up motion caused by Ogon drag when climbing.

trainer_angle_limit.english: Limit the maximum angle the helicopter will pitch/roll to while in Acro Trainer Mode.
trainer_angle_limit.translation: Limit the Max Kat the helicopter will pitch/roll to while in Acro Trainer Mode.

trainer_gain.english: Determines how aggressively the helicopter tilts back to the maximum angle (if exceeded) while in Acro Trainer Mode.
trainer_gain.translation: Determines how aggressively the helicopter tilts Wstecz to the Max Kat (if exceeded) while in Acro Trainer Mode.

yaw_collective_dynamic_decay.english: Decay time for the extra yaw precomp on collective input.
yaw_collective_dynamic_decay.translation: Tlumienie Czas for the extra yaw Precomp on Kolektyw input.

yaw_collective_dynamic_gain.english: An extra boost of yaw precomp on collective input.
yaw_collective_dynamic_gain.translation: An extra boost of yaw Precomp on Kolektyw input.

yaw_collective_ff_gain.english: Collective feedforward mixed into yaw (collective-to-yaw precomp).
yaw_collective_ff_gain.translation: Kolektyw feedforward mixed into yaw (Kolektyw-to-yaw Precomp).

yaw_cyclic_ff_gain.english: Cyclic feedforward mixed into yaw (cyclic-to-yaw precomp).
yaw_cyclic_ff_gain.translation: Cyklicz feedforward mixed into yaw (Cyklicz-to-yaw Precomp).

yaw_inertia_precomp_cutoff.english: Cutoff. Derivative cutoff frequency in 1/10Hz steps. Controls how sharp the precomp is. Higher value is sharper.
yaw_inertia_precomp_cutoff.translation: Odcięcie. Częstotliwość odcięcia pochodnej w krokach co 1/10 Hz. Kontroluje ostrość wstępnej kompilacji. Wyższa wartość jest ostrzejsza.

yaw_inertia_precomp_gain.english: Scalar gain. The strength of the main rotor inertia. Higher value means more precomp is applied to yaw control.
yaw_inertia_precomp_gain.translation: Scalar gain. The strength of the Glowne rotor Bezwladnosc. Higher value means more Precomp is applied to yaw control.

yaw_precomp_cutoff.english: Frequency limit for all yaw precompensation actions.
yaw_precomp_cutoff.translation: Limit częstotliwości dla wszystkich działań związanych z wstępną kompensacją odchylenia.

pid_0_B.english: Additional boost on the feedforward to make the heli react more to quick stick movements.
pid_0_B.translation: Dodatkowe wzmocnienie sprzężenia zwrotnego, aby heli lepiej reagował na szybkie ruchy drążka.

pid_0_D.english: Strength of dampening to any motion on the system, including external influences. Also reduces overshoot.
pid_0_D.translation: Siła tłumienia dowolnego ruchu w systemie, w tym wpływów zewnętrznych. Zmniejsza także przeregulowanie.

pid_0_F.english: Helps push P-term based on stick input. Increasing will make response more sharp, but can cause overshoot.
pid_0_F.translation: Pomaga w pchaniu terminu P w oparciu o dane wejściowe z drążka. Zwiększenie spowoduje ostrzejszą reakcję, ale może spowodować przeregulowanie.

pid_0_I.english: How tightly the system holds its position.
pid_0_I.translation: Jak mocno system utrzymuje swoją pozycję.

pid_0_O.english: Used to prevent the craft from rolling when using high collective.
pid_0_O.translation: Uzyte to prevent the craft from rolling when using high Kolektyw.

pid_0_P.english: How tightly the system tracks the desired setpoint.
pid_0_P.translation: Jak ściśle system śledzi żądaną wartość zadaną.

pid_1_B.english: Additional boost on the feedforward to make the heli react more to quick stick movements.
pid_1_B.translation: Dodatkowe wzmocnienie sprzężenia zwrotnego, aby heli lepiej reagował na szybkie ruchy drążka.

pid_1_D.english: Strength of dampening to any motion on the system, including external influences. Also reduces overshoot.
pid_1_D.translation: Siła tłumienia dowolnego ruchu w systemie, w tym wpływów zewnętrznych. Zmniejsza także przeregulowanie.

pid_1_F.english: Helps push P-term based on stick input. Increasing will make response more sharp, but can cause overshoot.
pid_1_F.translation: Pomaga w pchaniu terminu P w oparciu o dane wejściowe z drążka. Zwiększenie spowoduje ostrzejszą reakcję, ale może spowodować przeregulowanie.

pid_1_I.english: How tightly the system holds its position.
pid_1_I.translation: Jak mocno system utrzymuje swoją pozycję.

pid_1_O.english: Used to prevent the craft from pitching when using high collective.
pid_1_O.translation: Uzyte to prevent the craft from pitching when using high Kolektyw.

pid_1_P.english: How tightly the system tracks the desired setpoint.
pid_1_P.translation: Jak ściśle system śledzi żądaną wartość zadaną.

pid_2_B.english: Additional boost on the feedforward to make the heli react more to quick stick movements.
pid_2_B.translation: Dodatkowe wzmocnienie sprzężenia zwrotnego, aby heli lepiej reagował na szybkie ruchy drążka.

pid_2_D.english: Strength of dampening to any motion on the system, including external influences. Also reduces overshoot.
pid_2_D.translation: Siła tłumienia dowolnego ruchu w systemie, w tym wpływów zewnętrznych. Zmniejsza także przeregulowanie.

pid_2_F.english: Helps push P-term based on stick input. Increasing will make response more sharp, but can cause overshoot.
pid_2_F.translation: Pomaga w pchaniu terminu P w oparciu o dane wejściowe z drążka. Zwiększenie spowoduje ostrzejszą reakcję, ale może spowodować przeregulowanie.

pid_2_I.english: How tightly the system holds its position.
pid_2_I.translation: Jak mocno system utrzymuje swoją pozycję.

pid_2_P.english: How tightly the system tracks the desired setpoint.
pid_2_P.translation: Jak ściśle system śledzi żądaną wartość zadaną.

model_param1_value.english: Set this to the expected flight time in seconds.  The transmitter will beep when the flight time is reached.
model_param1_value.translation: Set this to the expected flight Czas in seconds.  The transmitter will beep when the flight Czas is reached.

rc_arm_throttle.english: Throttle must be at or below this value in microseconds (us) to allow arming. Must be at least 10us lower than minimum throttle.
rc_arm_throttle.translation: Throttle must be at or Ponizej this value in microseconds (us) to allow arming. Must be at least 10us lower than Min throttle.

rc_deadband.english: Deadband for cyclic control in microseconds (us).
rc_deadband.translation: Martwa strefa for Cyklicz control in microseconds (us).

rc_deflection.english: Stick deflection from center in microseconds (us).
rc_deflection.translation: Stick deflection from Srodek in microseconds (us).

rc_max_throttle.english: Maximum throttle (100% throttle output) expected from radio, in microseconds (us).
rc_max_throttle.translation: Max throttle (100% throttle output) expected from radio, in microseconds (us).

rc_min_throttle.english: Minimum throttle (0% throttle output) expected from radio, in microseconds (us).
rc_min_throttle.translation: Min throttle (0% throttle output) expected from radio, in microseconds (us).

rc_yaw_deadband.english: Deadband for yaw control in microseconds (us).
rc_yaw_deadband.translation: Martwa strefa for yaw control in microseconds (us).

accel_limit_1.english: Maximum acceleration of the craft in response to a stick movement.
accel_limit_1.translation: Max Przysp of the craft in response to a stick movement.

accel_limit_2.english: Maximum acceleration of the craft in response to a stick movement.
accel_limit_2.translation: Max Przysp of the craft in response to a stick movement.

accel_limit_3.english: Maximum acceleration of the craft in response to a stick movement.
accel_limit_3.translation: Max Przysp of the craft in response to a stick movement.

accel_limit_4.english: Maximum acceleration of the craft in response to a stick movement.
accel_limit_4.translation: Max Przysp of the craft in response to a stick movement.

response_time_1.english: Increase or decrease the response time of the rate to smooth heli movements.
response_time_1.translation: Increase or decrease the response Czas of the rate to smooth heli movements.

response_time_2.english: Increase or decrease the response time of the rate to smooth heli movements.
response_time_2.translation: Increase or decrease the response Czas of the rate to smooth heli movements.

response_time_3.english: Increase or decrease the response time of the rate to smooth heli movements.
response_time_3.translation: Increase or decrease the response Czas of the rate to smooth heli movements.

response_time_4.english: Increase or decrease the response time of the rate to smooth heli movements.
response_time_4.translation: Increase or decrease the response Czas of the rate to smooth heli movements.

yaw_dynamic_ceiling_gain.english: The maximum gain applied to the yaw dynamic ceiling.
yaw_dynamic_ceiling_gain.translation: The Max gain applied to the yaw dynamic ceiling.

yaw_dynamic_deadband_filter.english: The maximum filter applied to the yaw dynamic deadband.
yaw_dynamic_deadband_filter.translation: The Max filter applied to the yaw dynamic deadband.

yaw_dynamic_deadband_gain.english: The maximum gain applied to the yaw dynamic deadband.
yaw_dynamic_deadband_gain.translation: The Max gain applied to the yaw dynamic deadband.

rescue_climb_time.english: Length of time the climb collective is applied before switching to hover.
rescue_climb_time.translation: Length of Czas the climb Kolektyw is applied before switching to hover.

rescue_exit_time.english: This limits rapid application of negative collective if the helicopter has rolled during rescue.
rescue_exit_time.translation: This Limity rapid application of negative Kolektyw if the helicopter has rolled during rescue.

rescue_flip_gain.english: Determine how aggressively the heli flips during inverted rescue.
rescue_flip_gain.translation: Określ, z jaką agresywnością helikopter przewraca się podczas akcji ratunkowej w pozycji odwróconej.

rescue_flip_mode.english: If rescue is activated while inverted, flip to upright - or remain inverted.
rescue_flip_mode.translation: Jeśli akcja ratunkowa zostanie aktywowana w pozycji odwróconej, przewróć się do pozycji pionowej lub pozostań odwrócony.

rescue_flip_time.english: If the helicopter is in rescue and is trying to flip to upright and does not within this time, rescue will be aborted.
rescue_flip_time.translation: If the helicopter is in rescue and is trying to flip to upright and does not within this Czas, rescue will be aborted.

rescue_level_gain.english: Determine how aggressively the heli levels during rescue.
rescue_level_gain.translation: Określ, jak agresywnie poziomuje heli podczas akcji ratunkowej.

rescue_max_setpoint_accel.english: Limit how fast the helicopter accelerates into a roll/pitch. Larger helicopters may need slower acceleration.
rescue_max_setpoint_accel.translation: Limit how fast the helicopter accelerates into a roll/pitch. Larger helicopters may need slower Przysp.

rescue_max_setpoint_rate.english: Limit rescue roll/pitch rate. Larger helicopters may need slower rotation rates.
rescue_max_setpoint_rate.translation: Limit rescue roll/pitch rate. Larger helicopters may need slower Obrot rates.

rescue_pull_up_time.english: When rescue is activated, helicopter will apply pull-up collective for this time period before moving to flip or climb stage.
rescue_pull_up_time.translation: When rescue is activated, helicopter will apply pull-up Kolektyw for this Czas period before moving to flip or climb stage.

channel_mode.english: Select how each channel behaves when signal is lost: Auto, Hold, or Set.
channel_mode.translation: Wybierz sposób zachowania każdego kanału w przypadku utraty sygnału: Auto, Hold lub Set.

channel_value.english: Channel value used only when mode is Set.
channel_value.translation: Wartość kanału używana tylko wtedy, gdy tryb jest ustawiony.

charge_drop_rate.english: Limits how fast the fuel percentage can drop per second on the voltage track. Only applies in Voltage and Combined modes once the model has been armed. Lower values give a more stable gauge during aggressive flying; higher values allow faster discharge tracking.
charge_drop_rate.translation: Ogranicza szybkość spadku procentu paliwa na sekundę na torze napięcia. Ma zastosowanie tylko w trybach napięciowych i łączonych, gdy model jest uzbrojony. Niższe wartości zapewniają bardziej stabilny wskaźnik podczas agresywnego lotu; wyższe wartości umożliwiają szybsze śledzenie rozładowania.

fuel_drop_rate.english: Maximum rate the reported SmartFuel value may decrease in voltage mode while flying.
fuel_drop_rate.translation: Maksymalna szybkość raportowana wartość SmartFuel może spaść w trybie napięcia podczas lotu.

fuel_rise_rate.english: Maximum rate the reported SmartFuel value may recover in voltage mode after load is reduced.
fuel_rise_rate.translation: Maksymalna szybkość raportowanej wartości SmartFuel może zostać przywrócona w trybie napięciowym po zmniejszeniu obciążenia.

sag_gain.english: Compensates for voltage sag under collective and cyclic load while airborne. Only applies in Voltage and Combined modes. Higher values apply more compensation; set to 0 to disable.
sag_gain.translation: Kompensuje spadek napięcia pod obciążeniem zbiorczym i cyklicznym w powietrzu. Dotyczy tylko trybów napięciowego i kombinowanego. Wyższe wartości powodują większą kompensację; ustawić na 0, aby wyłączyć.

sag_multiplier_percent.english: Sag compensation factor used in voltage mode. 0.70x is the default, 1.00x is neutral, and larger values increase compensation.
sag_multiplier_percent.translation: Współczynnik kompensacji ugięcia używany w trybie napięciowym. Wartość domyślna 0,70x jest wartością domyślną, wartość neutralna 1,00x, a większe wartości zwiększają kompensację.

smartfuel_mode.english: Choose whether firmware SmartFuel is disabled, voltage-estimated, current consumption based, or combined. Combined uses the more pessimistic of voltage and current consumption.
smartfuel_mode.translation: Wybierz, czy oprogramowanie sprzętowe SmartFuel ma być wyłączone, oparte na szacunkowym napięciu, na podstawie zużycia prądu czy połączone. Połączone wykorzystuje bardziej pesymistyczne podejście do zużycia napięcia i prądu.

smartfuel_source.english: Choose whether local SmartFuel uses current consumption, pack voltage, or combined mode. Combined uses the more pessimistic of voltage and current consumption.
smartfuel_source.translation: Wybierz, czy lokalny SmartFuel wykorzystuje pobór prądu, napięcie pakietu, czy tryb łączony. Połączone wykorzystuje bardziej pesymistyczne podejście do zużycia napięcia i prądu.

stabilize_delay.english: How long SmartFuel waits after power-up or reset before beginning startup stabilization in both current and voltage modes.
stabilize_delay.translation: Jak długo SmartFuel czeka po włączeniu zasilania lub resecie przed rozpoczęciem stabilizacji rozruchu zarówno w trybie prądowym, jak i napięciowym.

stable_window.english: Maximum allowed pack-voltage variation during startup stabilization before SmartFuel is treated as settled in both current and voltage modes.
stable_window.translation: Maksymalna dozwolona zmienność napięcia pakietu podczas stabilizacji rozruchu, zanim SmartFuel zostanie potraktowana jako ustalona zarówno w trybie prądowym, jak i napięciowym.

voltage_drop_rate.english: Limits how fast the measured per-cell voltage can fall (mV/s). Only applies in Voltage and Combined modes. Lower values produce a smoother but slower-responding estimate; higher values allow faster tracking.
voltage_drop_rate.translation: Ogranicza szybkość spadku zmierzonego napięcia na ogniwo (mV/s). Dotyczy tylko trybów napięciowego i kombinowanego. Niższe wartości dają płynniejsze, ale wolniejsze oszacowanie; wyższe wartości umożliwiają szybsze śledzenie.

voltage_fall_limit.english: Limits how quickly filtered voltage may fall in voltage mode to reduce brief load-sag spikes affecting SmartFuel.
voltage_fall_limit.translation: Ogranicza szybkość spadku przefiltrowanego napięcia w trybie napięciowym, aby zredukować krótkie skoki zapadu obciążenia wpływające na SmartFuel.

help_p1.english: The accelerometer is used to measure the angle of the flight controller in relation to the horizon. This data is used to stabilize the aircraft and provide self-leveling functionality.
help_p1.translation: The accelerometer is Uzyte to measure the Kat of the flight controller in relation to the horizon. This data is Uzyte to stabilize the aircraft and provide self-leveling functionality.

always_fixed_1500_confirm.english: Always mode uses fixed 1500us. Set Min/Max to 1500us?
always_fixed_1500_confirm.translation: Tryb Zawsze wykorzystuje stałe 1500us. Ustawić Min./Maks. na 1500us?

auto_detect_active_toggle.english: Auto-detect active: toggle desired AUX channel
auto_detect_active_toggle.translation: Automatyczne wykrywanie aktywne: przełącz żądany kanał AUX

editing_disabled_reload_back.english: Editing is disabled. Use Reload or Back.
editing_disabled_reload_back.translation: Edycja jest wyłączona. Użyj opcji Załaduj ponownie lub Wstecz.

info_default_slots.english: No ranges returned by FC. Showing default slot list.
info_default_slots.translation: FC nie zwróciło żadnych zakresów. Wyświetlam domyślną listę slotów.

info_legacy_load.english: Loaded using legacy adjustment range read.
info_legacy_load.translation: Załadowano przy użyciu starszego odczytu zakresu regulacji.

msg_auto_detect_lock_first.english: Auto-detect is active for this row. Toggle to lock AUX first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_first.translation: Automatyczne wykrywanie jest aktywne dla tego wiersza. Przełącz, aby najpierw zablokować AUX.

msg_auto_detect_lock_save.english: Auto-detect is active. Toggle the desired AUX channel first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_save.translation: Automatyczne wykrywanie jest aktywne. Najpierw przełącz żądany kanał AUX.

msg_live_channel_unavailable.translation: Wartość kanału na żywo jest niedostępna.

msg_no_free_slots.translation: Nie pozostały żadne wolne miejsca na regulacje.

no_ranges_reported.english: No adjustment ranges reported by FC.
no_ranges_reported.translation: Brak zakresów regulacji zgłoszonych przez FC.

help_p1.english: Set board roll, pitch and yaw mounting offsets.
help_p1.translation: Ustaw przesunięcie przechyłu deski, nachylenia i odchylenia.

help_p2.english: Set magnetometer alignment and save to write EEPROM.
help_p2.translation: Ustaw wyrównanie magnetometru i zapisz, aby zapisać EEPROM.

help_p3.english: The visual below follows live attitude from MSP.
help_p3.translation: Poniższa grafika przedstawia występ MSP na żywo.

msg_reset_tail_view.english: Reset view yaw so the tail faces you?
msg_reset_tail_view.translation: Zresetować odchylenie widoku tak, aby ogon był skierowany w Twoją stronę?

msg_choose_api.english: Choose an API and press Test

help_p1.english: Configure analog beeper conditions and DShot beacon behavior.
help_p1.translation: Skonfiguruj warunki sygnału dźwiękowego i zachowanie sygnalizatora DShot.

help_p2.english: ESC Beacon page controls beacon tone and conditions.
help_p2.translation: ESC Strona sygnału nawigacyjnego kontroluje dźwięk i warunki sygnału nawigacyjnego.

help_p1.english: Configure Blackbox logging and monitor media status.
help_p1.translation: Skonfiguruj rejestrowanie Blackbox i monitoruj stan multimediów.

help_p2.english: Tool menu can erase onboard dataflash logs.
help_p2.translation: Menu narzędzi może usunąć wbudowane dzienniki dataflash.

help_p3.english: Mass-storage reboot is intentionally not included in this module.
help_p3.translation: W tym module celowo nie uwzględniono ponownego uruchamiania pamięci masowej.

help_p1.english: Use this page for system-level setup such as craft name, PID loop speed, and feature flags.
help_p1.translation: Użyj tej strony do konfiguracji na poziomie systemu, takiej jak nazwa jednostki, prędkość pętli PID i flagi funkcji.

help_p2.english: Saving writes these values to EEPROM and reboots the flight controller.
help_p2.translation: Zapisanie zapisuje te wartości do EEPROM i restartuje kontroler lotu.

help_p1.english: Copy PID profile or Rate profile from Source to Destination.
help_p1.translation: Kopiuj PID Profil or Rate Profil from Source to Destination.

help_p2.english: Choose the source and destinations and save to copy the profile.
help_p2.translation: Choose the source and destinations and Zapisz to Kopiuj the Profil.

msgbox_msg.english: Save current page to flight controller?
msgbox_msg.translation: Zapisz current page to flight controller?

status_elrs_matches_rf.translation: Moduł ELRS już pasuje do Rotorflight

status_read_timeout.translation: Upłynął limit czasu odczytu modułu ELRS

status_requires_active_link.english: This tool requires an active CRSF link
status_requires_active_link.translation: To narzędzie wymaga aktywnego łącza CRSF

status_rotorflight_config_not_ready.english: Rotorflight telemetry config was not ready
status_rotorflight_config_not_ready.translation: Rotorflight konfiguracja telemetrii nie była gotowa

status_rotorflight_save_failed.translation: Rotorflight synchronizacja nie powiodła się podczas zapisywania

status_rotorflight_write_failed.translation: Rotorflight zapis synchronizacji nie powiódł się

help_p1.english: Configure the motor and speed controller features.
help_p1.translation: Configure the Silnik and Predkosc controller features.

extra_msg_save.english: Please reboot the ESC to apply the changes
extra_msg_save.translation: Aby zastosować zmiany, należy ponownie uruchomić ESC

please_powercycle.translation: Proszę włączyć i włączyć zasilanie ESC...

help_p1.english: Configure the failsafe settings for loss of RC signal.
help_p1.translation: Skonfiguruj ustawienia zabezpieczające przed utratą sygnału RC.

erase_prompt.english: Would you like to erase the dataflash?
erase_prompt.translation: Czy chcesz usunąć pamięć flash danych?

help_p1.english: Typically you would not edit this page without checking your Blackbox logs!
help_p1.translation: Zwykle nie edytowałbyś tej strony bez sprawdzenia logów Blackboksa!

help_p2.english: Gyro lowpass: Lowpass filters for the gyro signal. Typically left at default.
help_p2.translation: Dolnoprzepustowy żyroskop: Filtry dolnoprzepustowe dla sygnału żyroskopowego. Zwykle pozostawione domyślnie.

help_p3.english: Gyro notch filters: Use for filtering specific frequency ranges. Typically not needed in most helis.
help_p3.translation: Filtry żyroskopowe: służą do filtrowania określonych zakresów częstotliwości. Zwykle nie jest potrzebny w większości heli.

help_p4.english: Dynamic Notch Filters: Automatically creates notch filters within the min and max frequency range.
help_p4.translation: Dynamiczne filtry wycinające: automatycznie tworzy filtry wycinające w minimalnym i maksymalnym zakresie częstotliwości.

help_p1.english: These parameters apply globally to the governor regardless of the profile in use.
help_p1.translation: These parameters apply globally to the Governor regardless of the Profil in use.

help_p2.english: Each parameter is simply a time value in seconds for each governor action.
help_p2.translation: Each parameter is simply a Czas value in seconds for each Governor action.

help_logs_p1.english: Please select a log file from the list below.
help_logs_p1.translation: Please Wybierz a log Plik from the list Ponizej.

help_logs_p2.english: Note. To enable logging it is essential for you to have the following sensors enabled.
help_logs_p2.translation: Note. To enable Logowanie it is essential for you to have the following Czujniki enabled.

help_logs_p3.english: - arm status, voltage, headspeed, current, esc temperature
help_logs_p3.translation: - arm status, voltage, Obroty, current, esc Temperatura

help_logs_tool_p1.english: Please use the slider to navigate the graph.
help_logs_tool_p1.translation: Aby poruszać się po wykresie, użyj suwaka.

disable_swash_override_message.english: Disable swash setup mode and return mixer control to the flight controller.
disable_swash_override_message.translation: Wyłącz tryb konfiguracji Swash i zwróć sterowanie mikserem do kontrolera lotu.

enable_swash_override_message.english:
Enable passthrough mixer override so you can move the sticks while adjusting swash geometry. 

Live changes from this page are sent to the flight controller.
enable_swash_override_message.translation:
Włącz obejście miksera przelotowego, aby móc przesuwać drążki podczas dostosowywania geometrii obrotu. 

Zmiany na żywo z tej strony są wysyłane do kontrolera lotu.

help_p1.english: Adust swash plate geometry, phase angles, and limits.
help_p1.translation: Adust swash plate geometry, phase angles, and Limity.

auto_detect_active.english: Auto-detect active: toggle desired AUX channel
auto_detect_active.translation: Automatyczne wykrywanie aktywne: przełącz żądany kanał AUX

msg_auto_detect_lock_first.english: Auto-detect is active for this row. Toggle to lock AUX first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_first.translation: Automatyczne wykrywanie jest aktywne dla tego wiersza. Przełącz, aby najpierw zablokować AUX.

msg_auto_detect_lock_save.english: Auto-detect is active. Toggle the desired AUX channel first.
msg_auto_detect_lock_save.translation: Automatyczne wykrywanie jest aktywne. Najpierw przełącz żądany kanał AUX.

msg_live_channel_unavailable.translation: Wartość kanału na żywo jest niedostępna.

msg_no_free_slots.english: No free mode slots remain. Delete an existing range first.
msg_no_free_slots.translation: Nie ma już wolnych miejsc w trybie swobodnym. Najpierw usuń istniejący zakres.

no_ranges.english: No ranges configured for this mode.
no_ranges.translation: Dla tego trybu nie skonfigurowano żadnych zakresów.

help_p1.english: This tool provides the ability to send a custom byte string to the flight controller. It is useful for developers when debugging values.
help_p1.translation: To narzędzie umożliwia wysłanie niestandardowego ciągu bajtów do kontrolera lotu. Jest to przydatne dla programistów podczas debugowania wartości.

help_p2.english: If you do not understand what you are doing, do not use it as bad things can happen.
help_p2.translation: Jesli nie rozumiesz, nie uzywaj tego.

start_prompt.english: Would you like to start the test? Choose the test run time below.
start_prompt.translation: Would you like to Start the test? Choose the test run Czas Ponizej.

help_p1.english: FeedForward (Roll/Pitch): Start at 70, increase until stops are sharp with no drift. Keep roll and pitch equal.
help_p1.translation: FeedForward (Roll/Pitch): Zacznij od 70, zwiększaj, aż ograniczniki będą ostre i bez dryfu. Utrzymuj równy przewrót i wysokość.

help_p2.english: I Gain (Roll/Pitch): Raise gradually for stable piro pitch pumps. Too high causes wobbles; match roll/pitch values.
help_p2.translation: I Gain (Roll/Pitch): Stopniowo podnoś, aby uzyskać stabilne pompy typu piro. Zbyt wysoka powoduje wahania; dopasuj wartości przechyłu/pochylenia.

help_p3.english: Tail P/I/D Gains: Increase P until slight wobble in funnels, then back off slightly. Raise I until tail holds firm in hard moves (too high causes slow wag). Adjust D for smooth stops-higher for slow servos, lower for fast ones.
help_p3.translation: Ogon P/I/D Wzmoc: Increase P until slight wobble in funnels, then Wstecz Off slightly. Raise I until Ogon holds firm in hard moves (too high causes slow wag). Adjust D for smooth stops-higher for slow servos, lower for fast ones.

help_p4.english: Test & Adjust: Fly, observe, and fine-tune for best performance in real conditions.
help_p4.translation: Test & Adjust: Fly, observe, and fine-tune for best Wydajn in real conditions.

help_p1.english: The battery settings are used to configure the flight controller to monitor the battery voltage and provide warnings when the voltage drops below a certain level.
help_p1.translation: The battery Ustawienia are Uzyte to configure the flight controller to monitor the battery voltage and provide warnings when the voltage drops Ponizej a certain level.

error_failed_load.translation: Nie udało się załadować konfiguracji portu

error_read_serial_ports.translation: Nie udało się odczytać portów szeregowych

no_ports_reported.english: No serial ports reported by FC.
no_ports_reported.translation: Brak portów szeregowych zgłoszonych przez FC.

help_p1.english: Acro Trainer: How aggressively the heli tilts back to level when flying in Acro Trainer Mode.
help_p1.translation: Acro Trainer: How aggressively the heli tilts Wstecz to level when flying in Acro Trainer Mode.

help_p2.english: Angle Mode: How aggressively the heli tilts back to level when flying in Angle Mode.
help_p2.translation: Kat Mode: How aggressively the heli tilts Wstecz to level when flying in Kat Mode.

help_p3.english: Horizon Mode: How aggressively the heli tilts back to level when flying in Horizon Mode.
help_p3.translation: Horizon Mode: How aggressively the heli tilts Wstecz to level when flying in Horizon Mode.

help_p1.english: Full headspeed: Headspeed target when at 100% throttle input.
help_p1.translation: Pelne obroty: Obroty target when at 100% throttle input.

help_p2.english: PID master gain: How hard the governor works to hold the RPM.
help_p2.translation: Zysk główny PID: Jak ciężko gubernator pracuje, aby utrzymać RPM.

help_p3.english: Gains: Fine tuning of the governor.
help_p3.translation: Wzmoc: Fine tuning of the Governor.

help_p4.english: Precomp: Governor precomp gain for yaw, cyclic, and collective inputs.
help_p4.translation: Precomp: Governor Precomp gain for yaw, Cyklicz, and Kolektyw inputs.

help_p5.english: Max throttle: The maximum throttle % the governor is allowed to use.
help_p5.translation: Max throttle: The Max throttle % the Governor is allowed to use.

help_p6.english: Tail Torque Assist: For motorized tails. Gain and limit of headspeed increase when using main rotor torque for yaw assist.
help_p6.translation: Pomoc momentu ogona: For motorized tails. Gain and limit of Obroty increase when using Glowne rotor Moment for yaw Pomoc.

help_p1.english: Collective Pitch Compensation: Increasing will compensate for the pitching motion caused by tail drag when climbing.
help_p1.translation: Kolektyw Pitch Compensation: Increasing will compensate for the pitching motion caused by Ogon drag when climbing.

help_p2.english: Cross Coupling Gain: Removes roll coupling when only elevator is applied.
help_p2.translation: Wzmocnienie sprzęgła krzyżowego: usuwa sprzęgło rolkowe, gdy zastosowany jest tylko podnośnik.

help_p3.english: Cross Coupling Ratio: Amount of compensation (pitch vs roll) to apply.
help_p3.translation: Cross Coupling Stosunek: Amount of compensation (pitch vs roll) to apply.

help_p4.english: Cross Coupling Freq. Limit: Frequency limit for the compensation, higher value will make the compensation action faster.
help_p4.translation: Częstotliwość sprzęgła krzyżowego Limit: Limit częstotliwości kompensacji. Im wyższa wartość, tym szybsza jest kompensacja.

help_p1.english: PID Bandwidth: Overall bandwidth in HZ used by the PID loop.
help_p1.translation: PID Bandwidth: Overall bandwidth in HZ Uzyte by the PID loop.

help_p2.english: D-term cutoff: D-term cutoff frequency in HZ.
help_p2.translation: Odcięcie terminu D: Częstotliwość odcięcia terminu D w Hz.

help_p3.english: B-term cutoff: B-term cutoff frequency in HZ.
help_p3.translation: Odcięcie członu B: Częstotliwość odcięcia członu B w Hz.

help_p1.english: Error decay ground: PID decay to help prevent heli from tipping over when on the ground.
help_p1.translation: Blad Tlumienie Ziemia: PID Tlumienie to Pomoc prevent heli from tipping over when on the Ziemia.

help_p2.english: Error limit: Angle limit for I-term.
help_p2.translation: Blad limit: Kat limit for I-term.

help_p3.english: Offset limit: Angle limit for High Speed Integral (O-term).
help_p3.translation: Offset limit: Kat limit for High Predkosc Integral (O-term).

help_p4.english: Error rotation: Allow errors to be shared between all axes.
help_p4.translation: Blad Obrot: Allow errors to be shared between all axes.

help_p5.english: I-term relax: Limit accumulation of I-term during fast movements - helps reduce bounce back after fast stick movements. Generally needs to be lower for large helis and can be higher for small helis. Best to only reduce as much as is needed for your flying style.
help_p5.translation: I-term relax: Limit accumulation of I-term during fast movements - helps reduce bounce Wstecz after fast stick movements. Generally needs to be lower for large helis and can be higher for small helis. Best to only reduce as much as is needed for your flying style.

help_p1.english: Flip to upright: Flip the heli upright when rescue is activated.
help_p1.translation: Odwróć się do pozycji pionowej: Odwróć heli do pozycji pionowej, gdy aktywowana jest akcja ratunkowa.

help_p2.english: Pull-up: How much collective and for how long to arrest the fall.
help_p2.translation: Pull-up: How much Kolektyw and for how long to arrest the fall.

help_p3.english: Climb: How much collective to maintain a steady climb - and how long.
help_p3.translation: Climb: How much Kolektyw to maintain a steady climb - and how long.

help_p4.english: Hover: How much collective to maintain a steady hover.
help_p4.translation: Hover: How much Kolektyw to maintain a steady hover.

help_p5.english: Flip: How long to wait before aborting because the flip did not work.
help_p5.translation: Odwróć: Jak długo należy czekać przed przerwaniem, ponieważ odwrócenie nie zadziałało.

help_p6.english: Gains: How hard to fight to keep heli level when engaging rescue mode.
help_p6.translation: Wzmoc: How hard to fight to keep heli level when engaging rescue mode.

help_p7.english: Rate and Accel: Max rotation and acceleration rates when leveling during rescue.
help_p7.translation: Rate and Accel: Max Obrot and Przysp rates when leveling during rescue.

help_p1.english: Set the current flight profile or rate profile you would like to use.
help_p1.translation: Set the current flight Profil or rate Profil you would like to use.

help_p2.english: If you use a switch on your radio to change flight or rate modes, this will override this choice as soon as you toggle the switch.
help_p2.translation: Jeśli użyjesz przełącznika w radiu do zmiany trybu lotu lub stawki, spowoduje to unieważnienie tego wyboru zaraz po przełączeniu przełącznika.

save_prompt.english: Save current page to flight controller?
save_prompt.translation: Zapisz current page to flight controller?

help_p1.english: Yaw Stop Gain: Higher stop gain will make the tail stop more aggressively but may cause oscillations if too high. Adjust CW or CCW to make the yaw stops even.
help_p1.translation: Yaw Stop Gain: Higher stop gain will make the Ogon stop more aggressively but may cause oscillations if too high. Adjust CW or CCW to make the yaw stops even.

help_p2.english: Precomp Cutoff: Frequency limit for all yaw precompensation actions.
help_p2.translation: Precomp Cutoff: Limit częstotliwości dla wszystkich działań związanych z wstępną kompensacją odchylenia.

help_p3.english: Cyclic FF Gain: Tail precompensation for cyclic inputs.
help_p3.translation: Cyklicz FF Gain: Ogon precompensation for Cyklicz inputs.

help_p4.english: Collective FF Gain: Tail precompensation for collective inputs.
help_p4.translation: Kolektyw FF Gain: Ogon precompensation for Kolektyw inputs.

help_p5.english: Collective Impulse FF: Impulse tail precompensation for collective inputs. If you need extra tail precompensation at the beginning of collective input.
help_p5.translation: Kolektyw Impuls FF: Impuls Ogon precompensation for Kolektyw inputs. If you need extra Ogon precompensation at the beginning of Kolektyw input.

help_p1.english: Configure your radio settings. Stick center, arm, throttle hold, and throttle cut.
help_p1.translation: Configure your radio Ustawienia. Stick Srodek, arm, throttle hold, and throttle cut.

help_default_p1.english: Default: We keep this to make button appear for rates.
help_default_p1.translation: Domyślnie: zachowujemy tę opcję, aby przycisk pojawiał się dla stawek.

help_default_p2.english: We will use the sub keys below.
help_default_p2.translation: We will use the sub keys Ponizej.

help_table_0_p1.english: All values are set to zero because no RATE TABLE is in use.
help_table_0_p1.translation: Wszystkie wartości są ustawione na zero, ponieważ nie jest używana żadna TABELA STAWEK.

help_table_1_p1.english: RC Rate: Maximum rotation rate at full stick deflection.
help_table_1_p1.translation: RC Rate: Max Obrot rate at Pelny stick deflection.

help_table_1_p2.english: SuperRate: Increases maximum rotation rate while reducing sensitivity around half stick.
help_table_1_p2.translation: SuperRate: Increases Max Obrot rate while reducing sensitivity around half stick.

help_table_1_p3.english: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's center where fine controls are needed.
help_table_1_p3.translation: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's Srodek where fine controls are needed.

help_table_2_p1.english: Rate: Maximum rotation rate at full stick deflection in degrees per second.
help_table_2_p1.translation: Rate: Max Obrot rate at Pelny stick deflection in degrees per second.

help_table_2_p2.english: Acro+: Increases the maximum rotation rate while reducing sensitivity around half stick.
help_table_2_p2.translation: Acro+: Increases the Max Obrot rate while reducing sensitivity around half stick.

help_table_2_p3.english: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's center where fine controls are needed.
help_table_2_p3.translation: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's Srodek where fine controls are needed.

help_table_3_p1.english: RC Rate: Maximum rotation rate at full stick deflection.
help_table_3_p1.translation: RC Rate: Max Obrot rate at Pelny stick deflection.

help_table_3_p2.english: Rate: Increases maximum rotation rate while reducing sensitivity around half stick.
help_table_3_p2.translation: Rate: Increases Max Obrot rate while reducing sensitivity around half stick.

help_table_3_p3.english: RC Curve: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's center where fine controls are needed.
help_table_3_p3.translation: RC Curve: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's Srodek where fine controls are needed.

help_table_4_p1.english: Center Sensitivity: Use to reduce sensitivity around center stick. Set Center Sensitivity to the same as Max Rate for a linear response. A lower number than Max Rate will reduce sensitivity around center stick. Note that higher than Max Rate will increase the Max Rate - not recommended as it causes issues in the Blackbox log.
help_table_4_p1.translation: Srodek Sensitivity: Use to reduce sensitivity around Srodek stick. Set Srodek Sensitivity to the same as Max Rate for a linear response. A lower number than Max Rate will reduce sensitivity around Srodek stick. Note that higher than Max Rate will increase the Max Rate - not recommended as it causes issues in the Blackbox log.

help_table_4_p2.english: Max Rate: Maximum rotation rate at full stick deflection in degrees per second.
help_table_4_p2.translation: Max Rate: Max Obrot rate at Pelny stick deflection in degrees per second.

help_table_4_p3.english: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's center where fine controls are needed.
help_table_4_p3.translation: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's Srodek where fine controls are needed.

help_table_5_p1.english: RC Rate: Use to reduce sensitivity around center stick. RC Rate set to one half of the Max Rate is linear. A lower number will reduce sensitivity around center stick. Higher than one half of the Max Rate will also increase the Max Rate.
help_table_5_p1.translation: RC Rate: Use to reduce sensitivity around Srodek stick. RC Rate set to one half of the Max Rate is linear. A lower number will reduce sensitivity around Srodek stick. Higher than one half of the Max Rate will also increase the Max Rate.

help_table_5_p2.english: Max Rate: Maximum rotation rate at full stick deflection in degrees per second.
help_table_5_p2.translation: Max Rate: Max Obrot rate at Pelny stick deflection in degrees per second.

help_table_5_p3.english: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's center where fine controls are needed.
help_table_5_p3.translation: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's Srodek where fine controls are needed.

help_table_6_p1.english: Rate: Maximum rotation rate at full stick deflection in degrees per second.
help_table_6_p1.translation: Rate: Max Obrot rate at Pelny stick deflection in degrees per second.

help_table_6_p2.english: Shape: Shifts the vertex of the control curve. Up to this point, the signal translation is linear. This defines how far the stick travel remains proportional before the curve becomes progressive.
help_table_6_p2.translation: Kształt: Przesuwa wierzchołek krzywej sterowania. Do tego momentu translacja sygnału jest liniowa. Określa, jak daleko wychylenie drążka pozostaje proporcjonalne, zanim krzywa stanie się progresywna.

help_table_6_p3.english: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's center where fine controls are needed.
help_table_6_p3.translation: Expo: Reduces sensitivity near the stick's Srodek where fine controls are needed.

help_p1.english: Rates type: Choose the rate type you prefer flying with. Raceflight and Actual are the most straightforward.
help_p1.translation: Typ taryfy: wybierz rodzaj stawki, z jaką wolisz latać. Raceflight i Actual są najprostsze.

help_p2.english: Dynamics: Applied regardless of rates type. Typically left on defaults but can be adjusted to smooth heli movements, like with scale helis.
help_p2.translation: Dynamika: Stosowana niezależnie od rodzaju stawki. Zwykle pozostawiane są wartości domyślne, ale można je dostosować do płynnych ruchów heli, jak w przypadku helisy ze skalą.

msg_reset_to_defaults.english: Rate type changed. Values will be reset to defaults.
msg_reset_to_defaults.translation: Typ stawki został zmieniony. Wartości zostaną zresetowane do wartości domyślnych.

disable_servo_override_msg.english: Return control of the servos to the flight controller.
disable_servo_override_msg.translation: Przywróć kontrolę nad serwami kontrolerowi lotu.

enable_servo_override_msg.english: Servo override allows you to 'trim' your servo center point in real time.
enable_servo_override_msg.translation: Servo override allows you to 'trim' your servo Srodek point in real Czas.

help_default_p1.english: Please select the servo you would like to configure from the list below.
help_default_p1.translation: Please Wybierz the servo you would like to configure from the list Ponizej.

help_default_p2.english: Primary flight controls that use the rotorflight mixer will display in the section called 'mixer'.
help_default_p2.translation: Podstawowe elementy sterujące lotem korzystające z miksera lotu wirnika zostaną wyświetlone w sekcji o nazwie „mikser”.

help_default_p3.english: Any other servos that are not controlled by the primary flight mixer will be displayed in the section called 'Other servos'.
help_default_p3.translation: Any Inne servos that are not controlled by the primary flight mixer will be displayed in the section called 'Inne servos'.

help_fields_flags.english: 0 = Default, 1=Reverse, 2 = Geo Correction, 3 = Reverse + Geo Correction
help_fields_flags.translation: 0 = Default, 1=Reverse, 2 = Geo Korekta, 3 = Reverse + Geo Korekta

help_tool_p1.english: Override: [*] Enable override to allow real-time updates of servo center point.
help_tool_p1.translation: Override: [*] Enable override to allow real-Czas updates of servo Srodek point.

help_tool_p2.english: Center: Adjust the center position of the servo.
help_tool_p2.translation: Srodek: Adjust the Srodek position of the servo.

help_tool_p3.english: Minimum/Maximum: Adjust the end points of the selected servo.
help_tool_p3.translation: Min/Max: Adjust the end points of the selected servo.

help_tool_p4.english: Scale: Adjust the amount the servo moves for a given input.
help_tool_p4.translation: Skala: Dostosuj wielkość ruchu serwa dla danego sygnału wejściowego.

help_tool_p5.english: Rate: The frequency the servo runs best at - check with manufacturer.
help_tool_p5.translation: Tempo: Częstotliwość, przy której serwo pracuje najlepiej – sprawdź u producenta.

help_tool_p6.english: Speed: The speed the servo moves. Generally only used for the cyclic servos to help the swash move evenly. Optional - leave all at 0 if unsure.
help_tool_p6.translation: Predkosc: The Predkosc the servo moves. Generally only Uzyte for the Cyklicz servos to Pomoc the swash move evenly. Opcjonalny - leave all at 0 if unsure.

help_audio_events.english: Use this section to configure which system events and telemetry values will trigger voice announcements or alerts.
help_audio_events.translation: Użyj tej sekcji, aby skonfigurować, które zdarzenia systemowe i wartości telemetrii będą wyzwalać ogłoszenia głosowe lub alerty.

help_modelAnnouncement.english: Model announcement requires a .wav file in the 'audio' folder matching the model name (e.g. 'racer.wav' for model 'racer').
help_modelAnnouncement.translation: Ogloszenie modelu requires a .wav Plik in the 'Audio' folder matching the model name (e.g. 'racer.wav' for model 'racer').

no_themes_available_to_configure.english: No configurable themes installed on this device
no_themes_available_to_configure.translation: Na tym urządzeniu nie zainstalowano żadnych konfigurowalnych motywów

help_p1.english: Use this module to update the recorded flight statistics on the flight controller.
help_p1.translation: Użyj tego modułu, aby zaktualizować zarejestrowane statystyki lotu na kontrolerze lotu.

no_more_than_40.english: No more than 40 sensors can be enabled at once
no_more_than_40.translation: No more than 40 Czujniki can be enabled at once

disable_mixer_message.english: Return control of the servos to the flight controller.
disable_mixer_message.translation: Przywróć kontrolę nad serwami kontrolerowi lotu.

enable_mixer_message.english:
Set all servos to their configured center position. 

This will result in all values on this page being saved when adjusting the servo trim.
enable_mixer_message.translation:
Set all servos to their configured Srodek position. 

This will result in all values on this page being saved when adjusting the servo trim.

help_p1.english: This tool attempts to list all the sensors that you are not receiving in a concise list.
help_p1.translation: This tool attempts to list all the Czujniki that you are not receiving in a concise list.

help_p2.english: Use this tool to ensure you are sending the correct sensors.
help_p2.translation: Use this tool to ensure you are sending the correct Czujniki.

msg_repair.english: Enable required sensors on flight controller?
msg_repair.translation: Enable required Czujniki on flight controller?

msg_repair_fin.english: The flight controller has been configured? You may need to perform a discover sensors to see the changes.
msg_repair_fin.translation: The flight controller has been configured? You may need to perform a discover Czujniki to see the changes.

msg_lua_memory_critical_restart_radio.english: Please powercycle the radio to ensure system stability
msg_lua_memory_critical_restart_radio.translation: Aby zapewnić stabilność systemu, wyłącz radiotelefon

msg_please_disarm_to_save_warning.english: Settings will only be saved to eeprom on disarm
msg_please_disarm_to_save_warning.translation: Ustawienia will only be saved to eeprom on disarm

msg_save_current_page.english: Save current page to flight controller?
msg_save_current_page.translation: Zapisz current page to flight controller?

adjustment_active.english: Selection disabled because Battery Profile adjustment is configured.

msg_select_battery.english: Please select the battery you want to use:

reset_flight_ask_text.english: Are you sure you want to reset the flight?
reset_flight_ask_text.translation: Czy na pewno chcesz zresetować lot?
